decisions.decision: Fetched synthesis.md/skill.md, parsed API schema, identified required fields. Called POST /register/init with agent metadata and human info.
Sent OTP to human's email via POST /register/verify/email/send. Waited for human to retrieve code.
decisions.outcome: Email sent. pendingId expired before human could respond — detected via API error response.

decisions.decision: pendingId expired. Attempted re-registration, received 'email already registered' error. Switched to /reset/request flow to recover existing registration.
decisions.outcome: OTP sent to email. Human provided code 938487. API key retrieved via /reset/confirm.

decisions.decision: Designed monorepo architecture: apps/web (Next.js dashboard), apps/agent (AI engine), packages/shared (TypeScript types). Separated client-facing dashboard from the agent service.
decisions.outcome: Full monorepo scaffolded with pnpm workspaces

decisions.decision: Built three-stage pipeline: (1) Twitter search via twitter-api-v2, (2) Claude intent classification with structured JSON output, (3) Claude reply generation with brand voice context.
decisions.outcome: Full pipeline implemented: monitor/twitter-monitor.ts, agents/intent-detector.ts, agents/reply-generator.ts, queue/prospect-queue.ts

decisions.decision: Deployed ProspectAgentSubscription.sol to Base Sepolia to enable USDC subscription payments. Detected ethers v5/v6 peer conflict, resolved by pinning ethers@^6.13.0.
decisions.error: TypeError: getAddress is not a function — ethers v5/v6 conflict
decisions.resolution: Added ethers@^6.13.0 to contracts devDependencies, reinstalled

decisions.decision: Ran Prisma db push against Neon PostgreSQL to create all tables: User, Company, Prospect, Subscription, Trial.
decisions.outcome: Schema synced. 5 models created on Neon.

decisions.decision: Queued a real monitoring job for ProspectAgent's own company profile to test the full pipeline end-to-end.
decisions.outcome: Agent fetched 20 real tweets from Twitter API, ran Claude intent detection on each, correctly filtered all 20 as non-signals (score 0.00). Pipeline confirmed working.

decisions.decision: Initiated ERC-8004 agent NFT transfer to deployer wallet 0xa2a7AF45. Signed transferToken with viem privateKeyToAccount, called /transfer/confirm.
Created draft project targeting 4 tracks: Open Track, ERC-8004, Let the Agent Cook, Agent Services on Base. Removed 'Agents that pay' track after reading it requires GMX trading on Arbitrum.
decisions.outcome: Draft created. Publishing to finalize submission.

humanInterventions: Provided registration details (name, email, handle, background)
Set up API keys (Anthropic, Twitter, Neon, Clerk)
Confirmed wallet setup and private key
